summary: No-ship: the proposed slice order cannot keep every slice green, and the target architecture leaves the largest browser orchestration module inside the supposedly thin entrypoint layer.
triage: review-gate SKILL.md rules govern: render EVERY finding as a full table row, the human decides each row (accept/reject/defer/question — free text), echo back before applying, max 2 rounds, append decisions.md and COMMIT it with this artifact.

findings.title: Slice 1 points Storybook at a stylesheet that is not moved until slice 7
findings.body: Slice 1 requires `.storybook/preview.ts` to import `src/app/styles/global.css` while describing the operation as an intact move of the existing directories. The stylesheet and `App.tsx` are only moved into `src/app` in slice 7. Building slice 1 as designed therefore leaves the Storybook import unresolved, contradicting the invariant that every slice must remain green and making the tracer sequence infeasible without unplanned changes.
findings.recommendation: Either hoist `App.tsx` and `global.css` into `src/app` in slice 1 and update all importers atomically, or keep Storybook pointed at `src/entrypoints/popup/style.css` until slice 7. Rewrite the slice table so every referenced path exists at the end of each slice.

findings.title: The design declares thin entrypoints but leaves background orchestration there
findings.body: The target says `entrypoints` contains only three-line mounts, but the only planned background change is import-path rewriting. The current `entrypoints/background.ts` is a 212-line composition root containing regex validation, session-rule replacement, badge/alarm application, backup scheduling, event listeners, and reconciliation wiring. As designed, this logic remains in `src/entrypoints/background.ts`, so the claimed boundary is not achieved; future browser orchestration changes will continue to accumulate in the entrypoint and bypass the proposed runtime/platform seams.
findings.recommendation: Define a background application/bootstrap module outside `entrypoints`—with explicit dependencies on runtime and platform—and make `src/entrypoints/background.ts` only invoke that bootstrap. Add this extraction to a named slice and state which responsibilities belong to runtime, platform, and the composition root.

next_steps: Correct the slice ordering/path transitions and re-run the design gate.
Specify and schedule the background composition-root extraction before implementation tickets are created.
